title: IIM Calcutta is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: IIM Calcutta is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Calcutta, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Calcutta:
IIM Calcutta is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Calcutta!
